{{Infobox character
| name = Naru Gwei
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|control the wind aura}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, fly}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Captain of the Skysworn, [[Underlord]], [[Skysworn Captain]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Skysworn sect, [[Blackflame Empire]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Stormrock]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Naru Gwei Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Naru]] Gwei is the [[Captain]] of the [[Skysworn]] and holds the rank of [[Underlord]]. As an adjudicator, he is responsible for upholding the laws of the [[Blackflame Empire]] and ensuring that imperial regulations are followed. He possesses large [[emerald]] wings and utilizes spiritual perception to navigate the world, as he does not belong to the [[Arelius bloodline]]. Physically, he is characterized by matted or dirty gray hair, a scarred face resulting from an injury caused by [[Blackflame]], and a tendency to chew on leaves. He carries a massive dark [[sword]] and wears green armor or a battered breastplate. In his official capacity, he oversees the ranking of various sects and manages imperial interests, such as inspecting the [[Twin Star Sect]]. He operates from a cloudship and maintains a residence in [[Starsweep Tower]].}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|An [[Underlord]] and [[Captain]] of the [[Skysworn]], [[Naru]] Gwei is a green-armored warrior who wields a long, notched dark gray [[sword]] and possesses the ability to control wind [[aura]]. He is characterized by his filthy gray hair, facial burn scars, and two enormous [[emerald]] wings that serve as his [[Goldsign]]. During a confrontation, [[Eithan's madra]] blast struck [[Naru]] Gwei's wings, ripping him backward over an abyss. Following his expected return, he began performing arrests under the authority of the [[Blackflame Empire]]'s emperor. Later, [[Naru]] Gwei attended a training session and saw [[Eithan]] complete a difficult task on his behalf.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">16</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] is a [[Captain]] of the [[Skysworn]] sect and an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] is present at the fight.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] can control the wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] has filthy gray locks and burn scars on his face.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] has two enormous [[emerald]] wings from his back.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]]'s wings are his [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan's madra]] blast hit [[Naru Gwei]]'s wings and ripped him back over the abyss.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] is a green-armored [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] wields a dark gray [[sword]] with a long, thick, notched blade.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] is expected to return soon.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] is a character with [[emerald]] wings who emits green nebulous [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] is the [[Skysworn Captain]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] has burn scars on his face and wears old, battered armor.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] arrests people in the name of the [[Blackflame Empire]] and by authority of the emperor.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] is a character present at the training session.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] completed a difficult task for [[Naru Gwei]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru]] Gwei is an [[Underlord]] characterized by [[emerald]] wings that grant him the ability to fly and a distinct burn located over his eye. After consuming a finger-sized leaf, he was noted by [[Lindon]] as someone who might be capable of sensing the elixir. During their interactions, [[Naru]] Gwei engaged in combat by trading blows with [[Lindon]]. He was also observed participating in a conversation alongside [[Chon Ma]] and a veiled [[Underlady]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Gwei]] is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Gwei]] eats a finger-sized leaf.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Gwei]] has [[emerald]] wings and can fly.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Gwei]] has a burn over his eye.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] mentioned [[Naru Gwei]] might sense the elixir.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has traded blows with [[Naru Gwei]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Gwei]] spoke with a veiled [[Underlady]] and [[Chon Ma]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Gwei]] dumped [[Yerin]] and [[Eithan]] out of [[Stormrock]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Naru Gwei]] is the [[Skysworn Captain]] who designed [[Stormrock]]'s proximity to Serpent’s Grave.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“He should have died with courage,” the Skysworn Captain barked.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“In the name of the Blackflame Empire, and by the authority of the emperor, you are under arrest,” the old man said.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“I don’t know what Naru Gwei would do if he sensed this,” Lindon said.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
